put.summary: Updates readonly models for a project
Add or update the relationship between an existing model, and the project

parameters.description: Scope to update the model if needed (optional)

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: If the scope of the model has restrictions on the number of projects that a model can belong to, remove the other relationships of the model with other projects

get.summary: Get the model content
get.description:
Retrieve the content of the model for the identifier modelId with the content type corresponding to the model type (xml for process models and json for the others).
For Accept: image/svg+xml request header, the svg image corresponding to the model content will be retrieved.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: The id of the model to get the content

parameters.description: The id of the model to update

file.description: The file containing the model content

get.summary: Export an project as zip file
get.description: This will create and download the zip containing the project folder and all related models.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The id of the project to export

parameters.name: attachment
parameters.description:
true value enables a web browser to download the file as an attachment.
false means that a web browser may preview the file in a new tab or window, but not download the file.

post.summary: Export a project as zip file
post.description: This will create and download the zip containing the project folder and specific model keys.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The id of the project to export

parameters.name: attachment
parameters.description:
true value enables a web browser to download the file as an attachment.
false means that a web browser may preview the file in a new tab or window, but not download the file.

schema.description: List of model keys to export. If not provided, all models will be exported.

get.summary: Filter all the releases of all released projects

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: The name of the project to filter releases.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The id of the project to filter releases

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the project to filter releases.

parameters.name: createdDateFrom
parameters.description: The date used as start of the interval to filter by creation date. It searches always for the day, removing the time information.

parameters.name: createdDateTo
parameters.description: The date used as end of the interval to filter by creation date. It searches always for the day, removing the time information.

parameters.name: showAllVersions
parameters.description: Default value is false, and it returns only the latest versions. If it is true, it forces the service to return all versions. If a version parameter is specified, the service will returns only the specified version.
